description.LOCATION_EN: Tseung Kwan O - Lam Tin Tunnel

2024-05-16T15:11:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to emergency repairing works , the tunnel tube fast lane of Tseung Kwan O - Lam Tin Tunnel (Lam Tin bound) is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-05-16T15:11:00.CONTENT_CN: 因緊急維修，將軍澳-藍田隧道(往藍田方向)的管道快線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-05-16T16:45:00.CONTENT_EN: The tunnel tube fast lane of Tseung Kwan O - Lam Tin Tunnel (Lam Tin bound) which was closed due to emergency repairing works is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-05-16T16:45:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因緊急維修而封閉的將軍澳-藍田隧道(往藍田方向)的管道快線現已解封。

2024-05-16T16:01:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Tai Po Road - Sha Tin (Tai Po bound) near Sha Tin MTR Station is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-05-16T16:01:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，大埔公路　–　沙田段(往大埔方向)近沙田港鐵站的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-05-16T16:19:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Tai Po Road - Sha Tin (Tai Po bound) near Sha Tin MTR Station is still being closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lane is available to motorists.   Traffic queues on Tai Po Road - Sha Tin (Tai Po bound) ends at Tsing Sha Highway near Tai Wai New Village and Shing Mun Tunnel Road near Mei Chung Court.   Traffic is congested now.
2024-05-16T16:19:00.CONTENT_CN:
因交通意外，大埔公路　–　沙田段(往大埔方向)近沙田港鐵站的部份行車線仍然封閉。
駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  現時在大埔公路　–　沙田段(往大埔方向)的車龍龍尾已到青沙公路近大圍新村及城門隧道公路近美松苑。  現時上址交通擠塞。

2024-05-16T16:26:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Lai Chi Kok Road (Cheung Sha Wan bound) near Nathan Road is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-05-16T16:26:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，荔枝角道(往長沙灣方向)近彌敦道的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-05-16T16:59:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Lai Chi Kok Road (Cheung Sha Wan bound) near Nathan Road which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-05-16T16:59:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的荔枝角道(往長沙灣方向)近彌敦道的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-05-16T16:36:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Gloucester Road (Central bound) near Percival Street which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-05-16T16:36:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的告士打道(往中環方向)近波斯富街的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-05-16T16:56:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Kwun Tong Road (Kwun Tong bound) near Hong Tak Road which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-05-16T16:56:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的觀塘道(往觀塘方向)近康德道的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-05-16T17:18:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain burst, part of the lanes of the junction of Pui To Road (Tuen Mun Road bound) and Tuen Mun Heung Sze Wui Road (Siu Hong bound) is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists.   Traffic is busy now.
2024-05-16T17:18:00.CONTENT_CN: 因水管爆裂，杯渡路(往屯門公路方向)和屯門鄉事會路交界(往兆康方向)的部份行車線現已封閉。駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-05-16T17:53:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain burst , all lanes of Tuen Mun Heung Sze Wui Road (Siu Hong bound) between Pui To Road and Yan Ching Street are closed to all traffic. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes.   At the same time, the slow lane and the second left lane of Pui To Road (Tuen Mun Road bound) near Tuen Mun Heung Sze Wui Road and the fast lane of Pui To Road (Tsing Wun Road bound) near Tuen Mun Heung Sze Wui Road are closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.   Traffic is busy now.
2024-05-16T17:53:00.CONTENT_CN: 因水管爆裂，屯門鄉事會路(往兆康方向)介乎杯渡路與仁政街之間的全線現已封閉。駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。  同時，杯渡路(往屯門公路方向)近屯門鄉事會路的慢線及左二線和杯渡路(往青雲路方向)近屯門鄉事會路的快線現已封閉。駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-05-16T18:08:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain burst , all lanes of Tuen Mun Heung Sze Wui Road (Siu Hong bound) between Pui To Road and Yan Ching Street are closed to all traffic. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes.   At the same time, the slow lane and the second left lane of Pui To Road (Castle Peak Road - San Hui bound) near Tuen Mun Heung Sze Wui Road and the fast lane of Pui To Road (Tsing Wun Road bound) near Tuen Mun Heung Sze Wui Road are closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.   Traffic is busy now.
2024-05-16T18:08:00.CONTENT_CN: 因水管爆裂，屯門鄉事會路(往兆康方向)介乎杯渡路與仁政街之間的全線現已封閉。駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。  同時，杯渡路(往青山公路-新墟段方向)近屯門鄉事會路的慢線及左二線和杯渡路(往青雲路方向)近屯門鄉事會路的快線現已封閉。駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-05-16T18:19:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain burst , all lanes of Tuen Mun Heung Sze Wui Road (Siu Hong bound) between Pui To Road and Yan Ching Street are still being closed to all traffic. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes.   At the same time, the slow lane and the second left lane of Pui To Road (Castle Peak Road - San Hui bound) near Tuen Mun Heung Sze Wui Road and the fast lane of Pui To Road (Tsing Wun Road bound) near Tuen Mun Heung Sze Wui Road are still being closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.   Affected KMB and Long Win bus routes nos. 62X, A33X have been diverted.   Traffic is busy now.
2024-05-16T18:19:00.CONTENT_CN: 因水管爆裂，屯門鄉事會路(往兆康方向)介乎杯渡路與仁政街之間的全線仍然封閉。駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。  同時，杯渡路(往青山公路-新墟段方向)近屯門鄉事會路的慢線及左二線和杯渡路(往青雲路方向)近屯門鄉事會路的快線仍然封閉。駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  受影響九巴及龍運巴士第62X及A33X 號線須改道行駛。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-05-16T18:39:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain burst , all lanes of Tuen Mun Heung Sze Wui Road (Siu Hong bound) between Pui To Road and Yan Ching Street are still being closed to all traffic. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes.   At the same time, the slow lane and the second left lane of Pui To Road (Castle Peak Road - San Hui bound) near Tuen Mun Heung Sze Wui Road and the fast lane of Pui To Road (Tsing Wun Road bound) near Tuen Mun Heung Sze Wui Road are still being closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.   Affected KMB and Long Win bus routes nos. 62X, A33X and MTR Bus route no. K51A (Fu Tai bound) have been diverted.   Traffic is busy now.
2024-05-16T18:39:00.CONTENT_CN: 因水管爆裂，屯門鄉事會路(往兆康方向)介乎杯渡路與仁政街之間的全線仍然封閉。駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。  同時，杯渡路(往青山公路-新墟段方向)近屯門鄉事會路的慢線及左二線和杯渡路(往青雲路方向)近屯門鄉事會路的快線仍然封閉。駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  受影響九巴及龍運巴士第62X,A33X號線及港鐵巴士第K51A號線(往富泰方向)須改道行駛。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-05-17T23:48:00.CONTENT_EN: All lanes of Tuen Mun Heung Sze Wui Road (Siu Hong bound) between Pui To Road and Yan Ching Street; and all affected lanes of Pui To Road (both bound), which were closed due to watermain burst, are re-opened to all traffic.   Affected bus routes are gradually resuming their original routeings.
2024-05-17T23:48:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因水管爆裂而封閉的屯門鄉事會路(往兆康方向)介乎杯渡路與仁政街之間的全線﹔以及杯渡路(來回方向)的所有受影響行車線現已解封。  受影響巴士路線亦逐步回復行駛原有路線。

2024-05-16T18:20:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to vehicle breakdown , part of the lanes of Kwun Tong By-Pass (Yau Tong bound) near MegaBox is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.

2024-05-16T19:07:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的荃灣路(往九龍方向)近荃灣體育館的部份行車線現已解封。

– Garden Road (uphill bound)
– Robinson Road (Conduit Road bound)

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) Train Service Enhancement
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 高速鐵路(香港段)加強列車服務

2024-05-17T19:26:00.CONTENT_EN: 12 pairs of High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) daily trains travelling between Hong Kong West Kowloon and Futian Stations will be added on 19 and 26 May to cater the travel demand. Tickets for the additional trains are available for sale starting today. All additional trains will be included in the Same-day Flexi-trip Arrangement for passengers to choose for changing their train trips. For the relevant train schedules, please refer to the High Speed Rail website or mobile app.
2024-05-17T19:26:00.CONTENT_CN: 高速鐵路(香港段)將於5月19日及26日，每日增加12對來往香港西九龍站及福田站的列車班次，以配合出行需求。 新增列車車票即日起發售。所有新增班次適用於「靈活行」即日變更車次安排，可供乘客選擇改乘。 有關列車服務詳情，請瀏覽高速鐵路網站或手機應用程式。

2024-05-17T19:55:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Wong Nai Chung Road (Aberdeen bound) near Sports Road is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.

2024-05-18T06:25:00.CONTENT_EN: There is an additional travelling time of 10 to 15 minutes on the Island Line between Kennedy Town and Chai Wan because of a signalling fault at Admiralty Station.
2024-05-18T06:25:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於金鐘站信號故障，港島綫來往堅尼地城至柴灣的車程延長10至15分鐘。

2024-05-18T06:32:00.CONTENT_EN:
Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that extra travelling time can be expected on the Island Line. 
Please allow more time for travel.
2024-05-18T06:32:00.CONTENT_CN:
運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知，港島綫列車預計需要額外行車時間，
請為行程預留充裕時間。

2024-05-18T06:40:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to a signalling fault near Admiralty Station, Island Line trains will operate at a slower speed between Central Station and Wan Chai Station. This could extend the total journey time on the Island Line between Kennedy Town Station and Chai Wan Station by 10-15 minutes.
2024-05-18T06:40:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於金鐘站附近有信號故障，港島綫列車駛經中環站和灣仔站路段時需要慢駛，港島綫來往堅尼地城站及柴灣站的行車時間預計需要額外10-15分鐘。

2024-05-18T07:00:00.CONTENT_EN: The signalling fault near Admiralty Station on the Island Line has been repaired. Train operations can now be safely resumed. Normal train service is gradually resuming.
2024-05-18T07:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 金鐘站附近的信號故障已完成復修。港島綫列車服務逐步回復正常。

2024-05-18T10:00:00.CONTENT_EN: Light Rail service disruption due to an incident on an Light Rail Vehicle near Chung Uk Tsuen Stop. Light Rail service diversion: Route 610, Route 614, Route 615 and Route 751 both directions are diverted and will not stop between Lam Tei and Hung Shui Kiu stops. Free MTR shuttle bus service is running between Hung Tin Road Emergency Platform and Siu Hong to carry affected passengers. Please also consider using other transport.
2024-05-18T10:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於鍾屋村站附近輕鐵發生事故，輕鐵服務受阻。 輕鐵路綫改道如下： 610綫，614綫，615綫及751綫改道，將不停藍地站至洪水橋站。 港鐵已安排免費接駁巴士，行走來往洪天路緊急月台至兆康，接載受影響車站的乘客。 乘客亦請考慮改搭其他交通工具。

2024-05-18T12:43:00.CONTENT_EN: The incident on an Light Rail Vehicle near Chung Uk Tsuen Stop has been handled. Light Rail service is gradually resuming.

description.LOCATION_EN: the roundabout between Hoi Yuen Road and Wai Yip Street
description.LOCATION_CN: 介乎開源道及偉業街之間的迴旋處

2024-05-18T15:46:00.CONTENT_EN:
The Transport Department announces at 03:51pm:
Due to emergency repairing works , part of the lanes of the roundabout between Hoi Yuen Road and Wai Yip Street is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.   At the same time, the fast lanes of Wai Yip Street (both bounds) between Kei Yip Street and Hoi Yuen Road are closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.   Traffic is busy now.
2024-05-18T15:46:00.CONTENT_CN: 因緊急維修，介乎開源道及偉業街之間的迴旋處的部份行車線現已封閉。駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  同時，偉業街(來回方向)介乎基業街及開源道之間的快線現已封閉。駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-05-18T17:36:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Lung Cheung Road (Tsuen Wan bound) near Lung Cheung Road Lookout is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-05-18T17:36:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，龍翔道(往荃灣方向)近龍翔道眺望處的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-05-18T18:15:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Lung Cheung Road (Tsuen Wan bound) near Lung Cheung Road Lookout is still being closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic queue on Lung Cheung Road (Tsuen Wan bound) ends at Lung Cheung Road near Diamond Hill MTR Station. Traffic is congested now.
2024-05-18T18:15:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，龍翔道(往荃灣方向)近龍翔道眺望處的部份行車線仍然封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時在龍翔道(往荃灣方向)的車龍龍尾已到龍翔道近鑽石山港鐵站。 現時上址交通擠塞。

2024-05-18T18:25:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Lung Cheung Road (Tsuen Wan bound) near Lung Cheung Road Lookout which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic. Traffic queue takes time to disperse.
2024-05-18T18:25:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的龍翔道(往荃灣方向)近龍翔道眺望處的部份行車線現已解封。 車龍有待消散。

2024-05-18T17:40:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , all lanes of Tolo Highway (Sheung Shui bound) near Tat Wan Road are closed to all traffic. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes. Traffic is busy now.
2024-05-18T17:40:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，吐露港公路(往上水方向)近達運道的全線現已封閉。 駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-05-18T17:44:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Tolo Highway (Sheung Shui bound) near Tat Wan Road is still being closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-05-18T17:44:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，吐露港公路(往上水方向)近達運道的部份行車線仍然封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-05-18T18:19:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Tolo Highway (Sheung Shui bound) near Tat Wan Road which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-05-18T18:19:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的吐露港公路(往上水方向)近達運道的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-05-19T07:20:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to suspected gas leakage, all lanes of the section of Wang Lok Street (both bounds) between Yuen Long Sewage Treatment Works and Wang Fu Street are closed to all traffic.   Affected MTR Bus Route K68 has been diverted.   Motorists are advised to use alternative routes.
2024-05-19T07:20:00.CONTENT_CN: 因懷疑氣體洩漏，宏樂街(來回方向)介乎元朗污水處理廠與宏富街之間的一段全線現已封閉。  受影響港鐵巴士路線第K68號須改道行駛。  駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。
